ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account (e.g., Net sales, Cost of sales) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., revenue, expense, asset, liability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period (e.g., Q1 2020, FY 2019) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the period */,
  "period_type" TEXT /* Type of the period (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "value" REAL /* Financial value for the account and period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial value */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpis" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI (e.g., Gross Margin Percentage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the KPI */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula to calculate the KPI */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the KPI */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Alert status for the KPI (e.g., OK, Warning, Critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpi_values" (
  "kpi_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI value */,
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the KPI */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated KPI value for the period */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the KPI value */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the KPI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_kpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("kpi_id") REFERENCES kpis ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpi_values_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, department head, executive) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being accessed */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the period being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
